name: avena-terminal
description: Avena Terminal MCP Server — Live investment-scored data for 1,881 new build properties across Costa Blanca, Costa Calida, and Costa del Sol, Spain. Search, filter, analyze, estimate ROI, compare alternatives, and assess market timing. Multi-currency responses (EUR/GBP/NOK/SEK/USD).

tools.name: search_properties
tools.description: Search 1,881 scored new build properties in Spain. Returns investment-ranked results with composite score, score reasoning, yield estimate, multi-currency pricing (EUR/GBP/NOK/SEK/USD), beach distance, and developer info.

region.description: Region: costa-blanca, costa-calida, costa-del-sol, or town name

type.description: Villa, Apartment, Penthouse, Townhouse, Bungalow, Studio

tools.name: get_property
tools.description: Full property details with investment score breakdown, human-readable score reasoning, and multi-currency pricing.

tools.name: get_market_stats
tools.description: Live market statistics: median price/m2, average yields, inventory counts, top towns, regional breakdowns.

tools.name: get_top_deals
tools.description: Today's best investment opportunities ranked by composite score with reasoning and multi-currency pricing.

tools.name: estimate_roi
tools.description: Project ROI for a property over a holding period. Includes capital appreciation, rental income, buying costs, and annualized return in EUR/GBP/NOK/SEK/USD.

tools.name: compare_alternatives
tools.description: Find similar properties to compare against a specific listing. Returns alternatives in the same price bracket with score and price differentials.

tools.name: market_timing
tools.description: Market timing indicators: phase assessment (buyer's/seller's/neutral), discount analysis, inventory levels, and actionable recommendation.

coming_soon.name: search_properties_portugal
coming_soon.description: Search scored new build properties across Portugal's Algarve, Lisbon Coast, and Silver Coast. Coming Q3 2026.

coming_soon.name: get_market_stats_portugal
coming_soon.description: Live market statistics for Portuguese new build regions. Coming Q3 2026.
